# Vishnu Gupta

> Full-Stack Developer, UI Designer & Founder of TheAlphaOnes

Hello! I am **Vishnu Gupta** (also known online as **NormVg**). I am a 20-year-old software engineer and UI designer specializing in building modern web applications, developer tools, and AI-integrated platforms.

## Overview
- **Name:** Vishnu Gupta
- **Alias:** NormVg
- **Titles:** Full-Stack Developer, UI Designer, Founder
- **Current Focus:** Building [TheAlphaOnes](https://thealphaones.com), a developer community and SaaS platform.
- **Location / Base:** India
- **Education:** B.Tech in Computer Science & Engineering, Manipal University Jaipur (2025–2029)

## Core Technologies
- **Languages:** JavaScript, TypeScript, Python, Go, SQL, HTML/CSS
- **Frontend:** Vue.js, Nuxt, React, React Native, Tailwind CSS, Three.js
- **Backend:** Node.js, Hono, Express, Go, Postgres, Redis, Drizzle ORM
- **AI & Tools:** Ollama, AI SDK, Langchain, OpenAI, Docker, Cloudflare, Electron

## About Me
I switched to Computer Science in 2021 and quickly fell in love with code. Rather than just following tutorials, I build products from scratch. My latest and largest project is **TheAlphaOnes**, which functions as both a "build-in-public" community and a suite of developer SaaS tools. I've also built a custom desktop IDE called **Kraken Editor** and run hackathons.

## Key Projects
- **TheAlphaOnes:** A build-in-public developer community & SaaS platform featuring a dashboard, waitlists, and integrations. Built with Nuxt, Hono, Postgres, and Drizzle ORM.
- **Kraken Editor:** A custom desktop code editor built from the ground up using Electron, Vue, and Node.js.
- **Fold Admin:** The admin dashboard driving waitlists and integrations for TheAlphaOnes ecosystem.
